conversations.question: Slack keeps crashing every time I open it

turns.bot:
Here are the steps to clear your cache in Slack:

Open the Slack App on your Desktop.
Click on "Sign in to EFG Slack Account."
This will redirect you to your Browser and open a Window.
Please click on "Open Slack."
In the upcoming Slack App, click on the three lines on the top left corner.
Navigate down to "Help," which will open a new menu.
Then navigate to "Troubleshooting," which will open another new menu.
Finally, click on "Clear Cache and Restart."
Slack will restart, and your cache will be clear.

See also:
Troubleshooting: How to clear your cache in Slack: 
            https://efgcloud.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/HKB/pages/3960700953
turns.user: Slack keeps crashing every time I open it

turns.bot: To give you the most accurate information, could you please specify which country this is about?
turns.user: What's our parental leave policy?

turns.bot:
Source: 
            Maternity, Paternity and Parental Leave - Denmark
          
Detail:

Maternity Leave: Consists of 4 weeks before the expected due date and 14 weeks after childbirth.
Paternity Leave: Fathers/co-parents are entitled to 2 weeks of leave after the child's birth.
Parental Leave: An additional period of up to 32 weeks is available, which can be shared between both parents.
Notice Requirements: Employees must notify their manager and local People Advisory and Compliance Specialist. For pregnancy leave, 3 months' notice before the expected due date is required. For paternity leave, 4 weeks' notice before the expected due date. For parental leave plans, notification is required at the latest 8 weeks after birth.
Parental Pay (for employees employed more than 12 months): If you have been employed for a minimum of 12 months and qualify for maximum state parental leave reimbursement from Barsel.dk and Udbetaling Danmark, the company offers a Parental Pay benefit. This full pay eligibility requires the paid leave to be taken within 52 weeks after birth. The maximum full pay cap is up to 33 weeks for mothers and up to 29 weeks for fathers/co-parents, provided they are the primary recipient and eligible for maximum reimbursement. The company covers the difference between the state reimbursement and your full regular salary.
Parental Pay (for employees employed less than 12 months): If you have been employed for less than 12 months, EFG Denmark provides full pay up to 25,000 DKK or 75% of your monthly salary (if above 33,333.33 DKK) for mothers for 4 weeks before birth and 14 weeks of maternity leave (maximum 18 weeks). For fathers/co-parents, it's full pay up to 25,000 DKK or 75% of your monthly salary (if above 33,333.33 DKK) for 14 weeks, to be taken within 14 weeks from the child's birth.
Adoption: Employees adopting a child are also entitled to Parental Pay under this policy, with specific provisions for leave prior to receiving the child.
Additional Leave Provisions: The policy allows for the transfer of leave entitlement between parents, flexibility in splitting leave, postponing a portion of parental leave, and applying for extended unpaid leave (subject to company discretion).
Annual Leave Accrual: Annual leave entitlements continue to accrue during parental leave.
Application Process: Maternity or paternity leave requests should be submitted through HiBob, ensuring the timing is coordinated with workload, deliverables, and deadlines.
turns.user: Denmark

conversations.question: How much annual leave do I get?

turns.bot: To give you the most accurate information, could you please specify which country this is about?
turns.user: How much annual leave do I get?

turns.bot:
Source: 
            https://efgcloud.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/EFGPCS/pages/4501831732
          
Danish employees accrue 2.08 days of paid leave per month. The leave year runs from September 1st to December 31st of the following year (a 16-month period). Employees are entitled to five weeks of annual leave, with at least three consecutive weeks to be taken during the summer leave period (June 1st - September 30th).
turns.user: Denmark

conversations.question: What do I do if I'm sick and can't come to work?

turns.bot: To provide the correct policy, I need to know your country. Could you please specify it?
turns.user: What do I do if I'm sick and can't come to work?

turns.bot:
Source: 
            Sickness and Care Leave - Germany
          
Detail:
Employees are entitled to up to 6 weeks (42 calendar days) of paid sickness leave per calendar year per illness, paid at 100% of their regular salary. After this period, sickness benefits may be received from the German statutory health insurance (GKV). While a medical certificate is not required for sick leave of 1-3 days, your employer can request it earlier. If you return to work before the original end date of your sick leave, you must provide a fitness-to-work certificate from a medical professional.
turns.user: Germany

turns.bot:
Restart the application: If the problem is a specific program, close it completely and reopen it.
Check your connections: For issues with monitors, keyboards, or the internet, ensure all cables are securely plugged in.
Check for updates: Ensure your operating system and drivers are up to date. For Windows, you can search for "Windows updates" in the start menu. Dell users can also use "Dell Command | Update" via the Company Portal.
Unplug and plug back in: For peripherals like monitors, try unplugging them from the laptop, waiting a moment, and then plugging them back in. If that doesn't work, try unplugging the peripheral from its power source.
Check the clock: Ensure your date and time settings are correct and synchronized.
For Dell laptops that won't turn on: Unplug from all power sources, hold the power button for 30 seconds, then plug back in and press power.

If you're experiencing a specific issue like a 1Password bug on a MacBook, a known workaround is to lock and unlock your Mac using Touch ID. If that fails, you can use the Kandji Self Service app to run the "Temporary Bugfix - 1Password unlock block" script, or restart your Mac. Disconnecting 1Password from the browser extension can also help.
If these steps don't resolve your laptop issue, please provide more details about the problem you're encountering. If you need further assistance, you can create a general technical support ticket here: 
            https://efgcloud.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/16/group/23/create/97
          
See also:

Need IT Help? A Quick Guide for Faster Support: 
            https://efgcloud.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/HKB/pages/4868702225
          
Windows First Aid: Something on my laptop is not working...: 
            https://efgcloud.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/HKB/pages/3621716867
          
1Password Requires MacBook Restart: 
            https://efgcloud.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/HKB/pages/4823646254
turns.user: I have a laptop issue

conversations.question: How many vacation days do I have? I'm in the UK

turns.bot:
Source: 
            Annual Leave - United Kingdom
          
In line with UK statutory requirements, employees are generally entitled to a minimum of 20 days of paid annual leave per calendar year, with part-time employees receiving a pro-rata entitlement. Public holidays are in addition to this. The holiday year runs from January 1st to December 31st. If your contract specifies a different entitlement, those terms will apply.
turns.user: How many vacation days do I have? I'm in the UK

conversations.question: My laptop is slow and I can't connect to the VPN

turns.bot:
For your slow laptop:
Here are some steps you can try to improve your laptop's performance:

Check for Updates: Make sure your Windows operating system is fully updated. If you have a Dell laptop, also run the Dell Command Update to ensure all drivers and firmware are current.
Restart your computer: A simple reboot can often resolve many common performance issues.
Unplug and Re-plug Peripherals: If you have external devices connected (like monitors, keyboards, or docking stations), try unplugging them, waiting a moment, and then plugging them back in.
Check the Clock: Ensure your system's date and time settings are correct and synchronized. Incorrect time settings can sometimes cause unexpected behavior.

In some earlier cases, a remote wipe and reset helped a user with a lagging laptop significantly improve its speed. If the above steps don't resolve the slowness, this might be an option to consider with IT support.
See also:

Windows First Aid: Something on my laptop is not working... (
            https://efgcloud.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/HKB/pages/3621716867
          )
Need IT Help? A Quick Guide for Faster Support (
            https://efgcloud.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/HKB/pages/4868702225
          )

For your VPN connection issue:
It looks like you're using CATO VPN. Here’s how you can troubleshoot your connection:

Ensure Access: First, confirm you have been granted access to CATO VPN. Your direct manager can add you to the correct Azure group. If you don't have a manager to assist, you might need to create a Helpdesk ticket to request access.
Client Installation:
Windows users: Install the CATO VPN client through the Company Portal.
Mac users: Install CATO VPN from the Kandji Self-Service Portal.
You can also download clients for all operating systems from 
            https://clientdownload.catonetworks.com/
          .


Connect: Open the CATO VPN application, click the connect button, enter your company email address, and if prompted for a sub-domain, use eslgaming.via.catonetworks.com. Then, log in using your Microsoft credentials.

If your VPN issue seems related to your wireless network, you might find helpful information in the EFG WiFi Guide for your specific device.
See also:

CATO VPN (
            https://efgcloud.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/HKB/pages/3621716421
          )
EFG WiFi Guide (Employees only) (
            https://efgcloud.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/HKB/pages/4638998604
          )

If you continue to experience issues with your laptop's performance or VPN connection after trying these steps, please consider raising a helpdesk ticket for further assistance. You can use the 'General technical support' form for general issues or 'Technical issue' for unexpected behavior.
turns.user: My laptop is slow and I can't connect to the VPN

turns.bot:
Account Management:
If you need to invite a guest to our Slack workspace, you can submit a Helpdesk Ticket. You can read more about how Slack guests work in the documentation.
We have information on enhancing your Slack security with Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA), especially for users who log in directly with a username and password.
There are also details on how to reactivate a Slack account or reset a Slack password.


Usage and Configuration:
You can find instructions on how to delete a Slack Workspace if you accidentally created one.
If you're experiencing issues, you can try clearing your cache in the Slack app.
You can personalize your Slack workspace by changing your theme on desktop or mobile.
There are tips for setting up your Slack profile, managing notifications, connecting your Google Calendar, and updating your status.
If you're seeing an incorrect online status, there are suggestions for setting your availability times.


Collaboration:
We have a detailed explanation of Slack Connect, which helps in creating shared channels and direct messages with users outside the organization, differentiating it from multi-channel guests.
You can find information on how to invite people to an existing channel or create a new channel for external organizations.


Integrations:
There's a guide for installing the Slack add-on for DocuSign to receive notifications.
We also have information about the GG Bot, a Slack-based recognition tool.


General IT Help:
If you have a technical issue, you can use the IT AI Chatbot in Slack for instant answers and troubleshooting assistance. If the bot can't solve your issue, it will suggest creating a ticket.



If your specific issue isn't covered by these topics, or if you need further assistance, I can help you create an IT support ticket.
